title: blumea gomphrena
intro: Blumea gomphrena is a perennial plant native to the Indian subcontinent and parts of Southeast Asia, belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Blumea gomphrena is used to treat various health issues, including fever, cold, and respiratory problems, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its leaves and roots are used in traditional medicine to create tonics and remedies.
